_notes: Hand-curated by reading tk-soft-condition differential against R4 Condition profile snapshot/differential. Source (tk-soft) is a constrained profile; target (R4) is the base FHIR R4 Condition resource. Direction is custom->base so most drifts are relaxations (INFO cardinalities). Key source constraints removed in R4: 2 root constraints, 3 custom extensions, category slicing with 2 slices, elevated cardinalities (clinicalStatus min=1, code min=1, recordedDate min=1), custom ValueSet bindings, narrowed type choices (onset/abatement), restricted reference targets, and code.coding mandatory sub-elements. R4 adds: version-pinned bindings (clinicalStatus, verificationStatus), extensible category binding where source had none, preferred severity binding (source had extensible), example bodySite binding (source had extensible), and widens onset/abatement types to include Range and string. Condition.subject min=1 is unchanged (both inherit R4 min=1).

drifts.description: Root constraints removed in target: [tk-con-1 (error: Condition must have either a code or a category), tk-con-2 (warning: Resolved conditions should have an abatement date)]. R4 base profile has no custom constraints.
Extension slicing removed in target: Source defines extension slicing (discriminator type=value, path=url). R4 base Condition profile has no extension slicing in its differential.
Extension slice 'conditionDuration' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. R4 does not define this extension.
Extension slice 'conditionSeverityScore' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. R4 does not define this extension.
Extension slice 'diagnosisGroup' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. R4 does not define this extension.
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source makes clinicalStatus mandatory (min=1). R4 base allows it to be absent (min=0).

Binding version pin added in target: Source uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-clinical) without version pin. R4 target uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-clinical|4.0.1) with version pin locking to R4 release.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had verificationStatus as MustSupport=true. R4 base profile has no MustSupport on this element.

Binding version pin added in target: Source uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-ver-status) without version pin. R4 target uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-ver-status|4.0.1) with version pin.
Cardinality changed: [1..*] -> [0..*]. Source requires at least one category (min=1). R4 base allows category to be absent (min=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had category as MustSupport=true. R4 base profile has no MustSupport on this element.
Slicing removed in target: Source defines category slicing (discriminator type=pattern, path=$this). R4 base has no slicing on Condition.category.
Slice 'problemList' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=problem-list-item) removed in target profile. R4 has no named category slices.
Slice 'encounterDiagnosis' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=encounter-diagnosis) removed in target profile. R4 has no named category slices.
Binding added in target: Source has no explicit binding on category. R4 target adds extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-category). Target introduces a recommended ValueSet.

Binding strength changed: Source uses extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity). R4 target uses preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity). Same ValueSet but binding strength reduced: extensible -> preferred.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had severity as MustSupport=true. R4 base profile has no MustSupport on this element.
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source makes code mandatory (min=1). R4 base allows code to be absent (min=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had code as MustSupport=true. R4 base profile has no MustSupport on this element.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). R4 target uses example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). Different ValueSet and binding strength reduced: extensible -> example.
Cardinality changed: [1..*] -> [0..*]. Source requires at least one coding element (min=1). R4 CodeableConcept base allows coding to be absent (min=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had code.coding as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source makes code.coding.system mandatory (min=1). R4 CodeableConcept.coding.system has min=0.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had code.coding.system as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source makes code.coding.code mandatory (min=1). R4 CodeableConcept.coding.code has min=0.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had code.coding.code as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.

Binding strength changed: Source uses extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site). R4 target uses example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site). Same ValueSet but binding strength reduced: extensible -> example.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had bodySite as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]. R4 target allows [Patient, Group] (base R4 reference). Reference is widened.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had subject as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had encounter as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]. R4 target allows base [Encounter] resource. Reference is widened.
Type widened: Source restricts to [dateTime, Age, Period]. R4 target allows [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. Types Range and string are added in target.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had onset[x] as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Type widened: Source restricts to [dateTime, Age, Period]. R4 target allows [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. Types Range and string are added in target.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had abatement[x] as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source makes recordedDate mandatory (min=1). R4 base allows it to be absent (min=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had recordedDate as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner]. R4 target allows [Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Patient, RelatedPerson] (base R4 reference). Reference is widened.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had recorder as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
MustSupport removed in target. Source had note as MustSupport=true. R4 base has no MustSupport on this element.
